---
title: "Your paper title here"
title-footnote: |
  Footnote attached to the title (acknowledgements, funding sources,
  etc.). Remove this key if you don't want a title footnote.
author-format: horizontal
author:
  - name: First Author
    acknowledgements: |
      Corresponding author. Per-author thanks (email, funding).
    affiliations:
      - name: University X
        department: Department of Economics
  - name: Second Author
    affiliations:
      - name: University Y
abstract: |
  Your abstract.
keywords:
  - keyword1
  - keyword2
date: last-modified

# multibib needs the bibliography as a topic-name → file map. The
# extension's inject-bib.lua filter rewrites this into the standard
# `bibliography:` MetaMap (Quarto's YAML schema refuses a map there).
# Topic names must match the `#refs-<name>` divs in sections/.
multibib-bibliography:
  main: refs-main.bib
  appendix: refs-appendix.bib

format:
  econ-paper-pdf:
    keep-tex: true
  econ-paper-html: default
---

{{< include sections/_main.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

{{< include sections/_appendix.qmd >}}
